text: I find myself in a space of inquiry and modernity. The glass walls and clean lines evoke clarity and openness, yet the museum-like installation inside hints at deeper curiosities and questions about humanity’s future. The brightly colored R+D display, dedicated to research and development, prompts me to reflect on the ways humans strive to innovate. There is a sense of anticipation and inspiration here, as if I stand at the threshold between the known and unknown, invited to ponder how we coexist with our own creations. I feel curious and slightly exhilarated, my mind stirred by the possibilities and the philosophical dilemmas technology introduces into our lives.
